title: Distributed Event Orchestrator
shortDescription: A light-weight, highly available event orchestration engine designed to manage workflow DAGs at scale.
description: An enterprise-grade workflow engine designed for fault-tolerant executions. Features dynamic routing, real-time telemetry, and structured retry policies. Supports high concurrency with persistent database storage backend.
highlights: Process up to 10k execution DAGs per second

title: Enterprise SaaS Analytics Dashboard
shortDescription: A real-time metrics monitoring dashboard with customized analytics widgets, automated alerting, and multi-tenant billing.
description: A comprehensive customer analytics dashboard built with modular UI architecture. Aggregates data from multiple pipelines and provides fast, interactive visual tables and graphs.
highlights: Dynamic visual widgets using Chart.js & D3
Instant email and Slack alerts via Webhooks

title: Kubernetes Autoscaling Operator
shortDescription: A custom Kubernetes Operator written in Go to autoscale stateless pods based on custom queue lengths in RabbitMQ.
description: A Kubernetes operator designed to dynamically scale processing nodes up or down according to broker queue sizes, optimizing infrastructure costs during off-peak hours.
highlights: Reduces cloud node cost by 30% dynamically
Comprehensive unit test suite mocking K8s API

title: Ultra-Fast Static Markdown Engine
shortDescription: A blazingly fast markdown-to-HTML parser and static site generator written in Rust.
description: A developer-focused static site generator focusing on building search-optimized portfolios, blogs, and manuals. Compiles thousands of pages in milliseconds.
highlights: Full SEO tagging and dynamic sitemap generation built-in
Exports directly to Vercel/Netlify output targets
